Family-owned since day one.

About us

A family-run apartment complex, built on respect and affordability.

We're a proud small business — not a corporate management company. When you rent from Gate Oaks, you're talking to the people who actually own and care for the property.

That means faster maintenance, real relationships, and a home that's treated with pride. We've been part of Northside Richmond for over 15 years, and we're not going anywhere.

No corporate middlemen

Talk directly to the owners, always.

Fair, honest pricing

Straight answers from the owners — just ask.

Responsive maintenance

Issues resolved within 24 hours.

Make Gate Oaks your home
